Meitheal — Home Assistant-Native Task Management Engine
=======================================================

Meitheal (pronounced "meh-hal") is a cooperative task and life management system
running as a Home Assistant addon. It manages household tasks, to-do lists, and
projects with voice control, automation integration, and multi-agent support.

## Quick Start

Meitheal exposes its API at the addon's base URL (default: http://local_meitheal:3000).
All endpoints accept and return JSON.

## Core API Endpoints

### Tasks

- `GET /api/tasks` — List all tasks
  Returns: `{ tasks: [{ id, title, status, priority, due_date, description, labels, position }] }`

- `POST /api/tasks/create` — Create a task
  Body: `{ title: string, frameworkPayload?: { description?: string } }`
  Returns: `{ id, title, status, ... }`

- `PUT /api/tasks/:id` — Update a task
  Body: `{ title?, status?, priority?, due_date?, description? }`
  status values: "backlog", "todo", "in_progress", "done", "cancelled"
  priority values: 1 (urgent) to 5 (lowest)

- `DELETE /api/tasks/:id` — Delete a task

### Search & Filtering

- `GET /api/tasks?status=todo` — Filter by status
- `GET /api/tasks?q=keyword` — Search by keyword
- `GET /api/tasks?priority=1` — Filter by priority

### Export

- `GET /api/export/tasks.json` — Export all tasks as JSON
- `GET /api/export/tasks.csv` — Export all tasks as CSV

### Health

- `GET /api/health` — Health check endpoint

### Home Assistant Integration

- `GET /api/ha/agents` — List available HA conversation agents
- `POST /api/ha/assist` — Proxy to HA conversation.process
  Body: `{ text: string, agent_id?: string, conversation_id?: string }`
- `GET /api/ha/calendars` — List synced calendar entities

### Agent Protocol (A2A)

- `GET /.well-known/agent-card.json` — Agent capability card (dynamic, per A2A spec §8)
- `POST /api/a2a/message` — Send A2A message

### MCP (Model Context Protocol)

- `GET /.well-known/mcp.json` — MCP server discovery (13 tools)
- `POST /api/mcp` — MCP tool execution endpoint (JSON-RPC 2.0)

## MCP Tools (13 tools, same across Astro + Python servers)

- `createTask` — Create task (title, description?, priority?, due_date?)
- `searchTasks` — Search by keyword, status, priority
- `completeTask` — Mark done by ID or title
- `updateTask` — Update fields (title, status, priority, due_date, description)
- `deleteTask` — Delete by ID
- `getTask` — Full details by ID (includes is_overdue, labels, timestamps)
- `getOverdueTasks` — All overdue tasks
- `getTodaysTasks` — Today's tasks + overdue
- `getTaskSummary` — Counts: total, active, overdue, done
- `dailyBriefing` — Full briefing with tasks, calendar, weather, who's home
- `getCalendarEvents` — HA calendar events synced into Meitheal
- `getUpcoming` — Combined tasks + calendar view (configurable days_ahead)
- `batchComplete` — Batch complete by label, priority, or title list

## Home Assistant Services

These services can be called from HA automations, scripts, and voice:

- `meitheal.create_task` — Create a new task (params: title, description?)
- `meitheal.complete_task` — Mark task done (params: task_id or title)
- `meitheal.sync_todo` — Force refresh task data
- `meitheal.search_tasks` — Search tasks (params: query, status?)
- `meitheal.get_overdue_tasks` — Get all overdue tasks
- `meitheal.notify_overdue` — Push overdue notification to HA

## LLM API Tools (for conversation agents)

When "Meitheal Tasks" is selected in a conversation agent's LLM APIs:

- `meitheal_search_tasks` — Search by keyword, status, or priority
- `meitheal_get_task` — Get full task details by ID
- `meitheal_create_task` — Create a new task
- `meitheal_complete_task` — Mark done by ID or title
- `meitheal_update_task` — Update priority, due date, status, description
- `meitheal_delete_task` — Delete a task permanently
- `meitheal_batch_complete` — Complete multiple tasks (by label, priority, or titles)
- `meitheal_get_overdue` — List overdue tasks
- `meitheal_get_todays_tasks` — Today's tasks + overdue
- `meitheal_get_task_summary` — Active, overdue, done, total counts
- `meitheal_get_calendar_events` — Calendar events from HA
- `meitheal_get_upcoming` — Combined tasks + calendar upcoming view
- `meitheal_daily_briefing` — Full day briefing (weather, tasks, calendar, who's home)

## Voice Commands (no LLM required)

These work with HA's built-in Assist without any LLM:

- "add [item] to my tasks" — creates a task
- "done with [item]" / "mark [item] done" — completes a task
- "delete [item]" / "remove [item]" — deletes a task
- "show my tasks" / "what's on my list" — lists active tasks
- "what's late" / "what's overdue" — shows overdue tasks
- "today's tasks" / "what's due today" — today's agenda
- "how many tasks" / "task count" — summary counts
- "good morning" / "brief me" / "start my day" — daily briefing

Also responds to "meitheal", "me hall", "may hall", "meh hall", or "MH":
- "MH add buy groceries"
- "meitheal today"
- "me hall what's overdue"

## Event Bus Integration

Meitheal fires and listens to HA events on hass.bus:

### Outbound Events (fired by Meitheal, available for HA automations)
- `meitheal_task_created` — { task_id, title, source }
- `meitheal_task_completed` — { task_id, title, source }
- `meitheal_task_updated` — { task_id, title, changed_fields, source }
- `meitheal_task_deleted` — { task_id, title, source }
- `meitheal_task_overdue` — { task_id, title, due_date }
- `meitheal_board_updated` — { total, active, overdue, source }

### Dedup
- Addon fires with `source: 'meitheal'`, component fires with `source: 'component'`
- Each side filters its own events to prevent circular loops

### Logbook Integration
All task mutations appear in HA's history/logbook as `logbook_entry` events.

## Device Automation Triggers

6 triggers available in HA's Automation UI:
- "Task was created in Meitheal"
- "Task was completed in Meitheal"
- "Task was updated in Meitheal"
- "Task was deleted from Meitheal"
- "Task became overdue in Meitheal"
- "Meitheal board data changed"

## Sensor Entities (with rich attributes for AI)

### sensor.meitheal_active_tasks
- State: count of non-done tasks
- Attributes: task_titles (top 10), priority_breakdown, has_urgent, with_due_date

### sensor.meitheal_overdue_tasks
- State: count of overdue tasks
- Attributes: task_titles (top 10), due_dates, oldest_due

### sensor.meitheal_total_tasks
- State: total task count
- Attributes: status_breakdown, label_summary (top 10), done_count, in_progress_count

### todo.meitheal_tasks
- Full TodoListEntity with CRUD, move, due_date, description support
- Exposed to Assist for voice commands

## Data Model

### Task Object
```json
{
  "id": "string (UUID)",
  "title": "string",
  "status": "backlog | todo | in_progress | done | cancelled",
  "priority": 1-5,
  "description": "string | null",
  "due_date": "ISO 8601 date | null",
  "labels": ["string"],
  "position": 0,
  "created_at": "ISO 8601 datetime",
  "updated_at": "ISO 8601 datetime"
}
```

### Priority Scale
- 1: Urgent (highest)
- 2: High
- 3: Medium (default)
- 4: Low
- 5: Lowest

### Status Flow
backlog → todo → in_progress → done
todo → cancelled

## Authentication

When running as an HA addon, requests through ingress are authenticated by
the Supervisor. Direct API access requires the `SUPERVISOR_TOKEN` or
HA long-lived access token in the Authorization header.

## Diagnostics

Settings → Integrations → Meitheal → Download Diagnostics exports:
task stats, connection info, registered services, entity summary (no PII).
